name: Soar to the Beat Rhythm Challenge Event
description: Pilot your spacecraft alongside other Resonators and hit the notes in time with the music to complete the track. A stage is completed once the spacecraft completes its journey.

name: Endstate Matrix High Difficulty Recurring Challenge
description: In Endstate Matrix, deploy Resonators and select a Power Circuit before starting a high-difficulty challenge. Endstate Matrix progresses through Challenge Cycles. Each Challenge Cycle spans across multiple Challenge Phases, which reset with version updates. Rewards are offered independently for Challenge Cycles and Challenge Phases.

name: Whimpering Wastes
description: Assemble unique lineups and equip distinct Tokens to conquer challenging levels.

name: [Bountiful Crescendo] Limited-Time Material Double Drop Event
description: Spend Waveplates to claim double rewards after completing a Simulation or Forgery Challenge.

name: Lahai-Roi Blocks Leisure Event
description: Drag the blocks to complete a full row or column to clear blocks and earn points. Each stage has two difficulties: Normal and Hard. Finish the Normal difficulty to unlock the Hard challenge. Complete the goals of each stage to earn rewards.

name: Whimpering Wastes
description: Assemble unique lineups and equip distinct Tokens to conquer challenging levels.

name: Speed up! F.U.E.L. Instrumentality Project! Leisure Event
description: Control your Resonator to move left and right to catch falling food and earn Gourmet Points. Catch food to build Energy. Once your Energy bar is full, you can activate a powerful Resonator Skill.

name: Gifts of Solsworn 7-Day Login Event
description: During the event, log in to claim the day's login rewards.

name: Knights of the Wild Featured Challenge Event
description: During the exam, explore, defeat powerful foes, and repair Mechascouts across Lahai-Roi to earn plenty of rewards including Astrites.

name: Pioneer Podcast
description: During Pioneer Podcast, you can obtain Podcast EXP by completing Podcast Tasks to increase the Podcast Level and win various rewards.

name: Tactical Hologram: Synchronization
description: [Tactical Hologram: Synchronization] is a prime testing ground for combat prowess, where powerful foes abound. Get ready to challenge Tactical Hologram: Hyvatia in Version 3.2's Tactical Hologram!

name: The Flaming Red in Memory Showcase Event
description: Platya, a Black Shores Bloom Bearer, has come to Startorch Academy chasing rumors of a Ghost Miko-whispers that seem to echo the legend of the "Lady Miko" of her distant homeland. Intrigued, you join her search.

name: [Chord Cleansing] Limited-Time Echo Double Drop Event
description: Spend Waveplates to claim double rewards after completing a Tacet Suppression challenge.
